curation_notes: Patch adds validates :name, length: { maximum: 2048 } to the User model. Only one non-test source file changed (publify_core/app/models/user.rb). The vulnerability is a class-level missing validation, so function is null. Pre-assigned class integer-overflow confirmed — CWE-190 and advisory description both indicate integer overflow/wraparound from an unlimited-length name field. No sibling models share this exact vulnerability pattern.
